You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Prague
TO: Athens
BY: Boat
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: On April 10

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Prague
TO: Athens
BY: Boat
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: On April 10

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of class do you wish?
ANSWER: I would like to travel in economy class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the destination of your trip?
ANSWER: My destination is Athens.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Do you want a specific kind of transport?
ANSWER: I would like to travel by boat.
TRAVEL-AGENT: When does your trip begin?
ANSWER: My trip begins on April 10.
ME:  Has the travel agent been informed about your destination? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Prague
TO: Athens
BY: Boat
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: On April 10

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
